allow: Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false -c user.name=EduWeb -c user.email=info@eduweb.ci commit -q -m 'fix\(header\): titres du menu sur une seule ligne + hamburger dès 1024px *)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ $c | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; "port 3000 listeners: " + \(\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count\))
